message:
🐛 Fix edit pencil not showing for Console docs on main branch (#828)

Console documentation lives in the docs repo itself (unlike other projects
that have separate source repos). Add DOCS_REPO_PROJECTS array to handle
projects whose docs are in the docs repo, fixing the missing edit pencil
for Console pages when viewing the main branch.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
